case_title: SHAUNA DURANT VS. SAN FRANCISCO STUDENT HOUSING, LP ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF SHAUNA DURANT APPEARED VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STUDENT HOUSING, LP, APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN DAVY, GENERAL MANAGER. NO APPEARANCES BY UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC AND UPTOWN RESIDENCES II LLC. PROOF OF SERVICES ON FILE. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURANT, SHAUNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO STUDENT HOUSING, LP UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC UPTOWN RESIDENCES II LLC SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
